query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT id) FROM alunos WHERE programId = 18) as total_alunos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mentoring_sessions ms JOIN alunos a ON ms.alunoId = a.id WHERE a.programId = 18) as total_mentorias,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ac.competenciaId) FROM assessment_competencias ac JOIN assessment_pdi ap ON ac.assessmentId = ap.id JOIN alunos a ON ap.alunoId = a.id WHERE a.programId = 18) as total_competencias,
  (SELECT name FROM programs WHERE id = 18) as programa_nome;

  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT id) FROM alunos WHERE programId = 18) as total_alunos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mentoring_sessions ms JOIN alunos a ON ms.alunoId = a.id WHERE a.programId = 18) as total_mentorias,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ac.competenciaId) FROM assessment_competencias ac JOIN assessment_pdi ap ON ac.assessmentId = ap.id JOIN alunos a ON ap.alunoId = a.id WHERE a.programId = 18) as total_competencias,
  (SELECT name FROM programs WHERE id = 18) as programa_nome;
